did.physdesc: Printed Materials, Publications, Reports, Research Materials

did.abstract: Collection contains memoranda, studies, profiles, statistics, annual reports, and other records of the office.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Collection contains memoranda, studies, profiles, statistics, annual reports, and other records of the office.
